overview.purpose: To ensure new employees receive their configured laptop and security tokens prior to their Day 1 start date, utilizing zero-touch enrollment.
overview.scope: Covers the process from HR contract signature to physical delivery of the hardware. Excludes software license provisioning (covered in BPD-2026-SW-PROV).
triggeringEvents: HR Information System (Workday) status changes to 'Hired'.
expectedOutcomes: Asset is registered in the IT Service Management (ITSM) CMDB.

actors.name: Workday Integration System
actors.description: HR platform that pushes new hire data.

actors.name: IT Asset Manager
actors.description: IT staff responsible for physical inventory.

processSteps.name: Generate Provisioning Ticket
processSteps.description: Workday fires a webhook to ServiceNow containing the new hire's role, start date, and shipping address.

processSteps.name: Role-to-Hardware Mapping
processSteps.description: ServiceNow checks the mapping matrix to determine the correct hardware SKU based on the employee's department.

processSteps.name: Pick and Pack Hardware
processSteps.description: Asset Manager pulls the physical laptop from inventory, scans the serial number into ServiceNow, and prints the FedEx shipping label.

processSteps.name: Zero-Touch Enrollment Registration
processSteps.description: ServiceNow registers the scanned Serial Number with Apple Business Manager and assigns the Mobile Device Management (MDM) profile.

exceptions.condition: Required Hardware SKU is Out of Stock in local inventory.
exceptions.handlingProcedure: Asset Manager overrides the ticket to generate a drop-ship purchase order directly to the vendor (CDW) using the employee's shipping address. Asset Manager updates the RITM state to 'Awaiting Vendor Shipment'.

metrics.measurementMethod: Time elapsed between Workday webhook receipt (STEP-100) and FedEx label generation (STEP-120).
Percentage of laptops that successfully pull their MDM profile upon first boot without IT intervention.
